setup.title: System Setup Wizard
setup.subtitle: Configure your SmartCookie application instance
setup.templatesDesc: Choose which default role templates you want to seed for your company. This step is optional and can be skipped.
setup.adminDesc: This administrator account will hold root permissions to configure companies and lessons.
setup.recoveryEmailDesc: Used to receive important system notifications.
setup.complexityCase: At least 1 uppercase and 1 lowercase letter
setup.complexitySym: At least 1 number and 1 special symbol
setup.companyDesc: Define the primary workspace identity. This represents your root entity.
setup.contactInfoDesc: Support info associated with this workspace profile.

acceptInvitation.title: Activate Your Account
acceptInvitation.subtitle: Set your secure password to activate your invitation
acceptInvitation.success: Account activated successfully! Logging you in...

errors.length: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to request a reset link
forgotPassword.success: If the email exists and is active, a password reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new secure password for your account
resetPassword.success: Password updated successfully! Logging you in...

errors.length: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.rolesDesc: Configure roles, duplicate/delete them, and customize hierarchical parent role access levels.
settings.hubSubtitle: Customize and manage your system environment settings, user permissions, and directory controls.
settings.rolesSubtitle: Configure role-based access control (RBAC), system permissions, and company settings.
settings.userGroupManagementSubtitle: Manage your company department structure, organization units, and learning group cohorts.
settings.userGroupManagementDesc: Manage organization units, hierarchy, learning groups, and memberships for corporate structural organization.

rbac.title: Role-Based Access Control
rbac.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this role?
rbac.superuserProtected: Superuser role is protected and cannot be modified.

expiring.title: Expiring Temporary Groups
expiring.description: Temporary training cohorts expiring within the 3-day notification threshold window.
expiring.noGroupsDesc: All active temporary training cohorts have comfortable remaining lifetimes.

errors.failedToLoad: Failed to load expiring learning groups.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred while loading expiring groups.

groups.title: Learning Cohorts & Groups
groups.subtitle: Nestable cohorts, project teams, and training class assignments.
groups.noCohortsDesc: Create your first learning cohort using the form on the right.
groups.deletedDesc: Deleted cohort groups can be fully restored along with all user training tracking records.
groups.cohortNamePlaceholder: e.g. Q3 New Grads, Sales Camp
groups.parentNote: Nesting is for organizational grouping only. A member of a child group is not automatically a member of the parent.
groups.moveText: Move {{name}} to a different position in the learning group tree hierarchy.

errors.unexpectedFetch: An unexpected error occurred while fetching learning groups data.
errors.failedToAddMember: Failed to add member to group.

structure.treeSubtitle: Hierarchical visualization of your corporate organization divisions.
structure.noUnitsDesc: Create your first top-level unit using the form on the right.
structure.recentlyDeletedDesc: Organization units soft-deleted within the last 14 days can be recovered with all historical memberships.
structure.moveUserTextSuffix: Moving the user automatically terminates any of their existing primary corporate Division memberships.
structure.assignManagerText: Assign a manager to govern the unit {{name}}.
structure.deleteModalSubtitle: Configure deletion style behavior and review the real-time affected users list.
structure.reassignOptionDesc: Reassign direct child units to the parent unit. Soft-delete only this target node.
structure.subtreeOptionDesc: Soft-delete this unit and all of its nested child units together in a single cascade.
structure.noAffectedMembers: No active users or manager memberships will be affected by this deletion.

errors.unexpectedFetch: An unexpected error occurred while fetching organization data.
errors.failedToAssignUser: Failed to assign user to organization unit.
